title: Wire semantic search into memory retrieval
summary: Embedding infrastructure is complete (embedding.ts, vector generation, Memory type supports embedding field) but not wired into the primary memory retrieval path. Existing semantic search helpers need to be integrated.
acceptance: Semantic search integrated into memory.ts retrieval flow
Semantic / graph-based memory retrieval helper wired into the primary retrieval path
Performance benchmarks show improved memory relevance
Tests added for semantic search edge cases
impact: High - improves memory relevance and query quality
notes: All infrastructure is in place. This is integration work to connect existing components.
